title: Proverb of The Wide-Net Heavy Blade

story.text: # 📜 Proverb of The Wide-Net Heavy Blade
> The weaver who casts a net across seventeen stars does not seek to catch the light, but to define the space where the light is free to dance.
— inscribed on [[The Wide-Net Heavy Blade]]  ·  *The Understanding Blade*
